ToolTreaux Platinum Testing Kit Acid Solution, Stone Neutralizer Combo

Easily test the purity of platinum with ToolTreaux’s Platinum Testing Kit with Testing Stone and Neutralizer Combo! The kit includes one 0.5oz bottle of platinum testing solution, one 0.5oz bottle of neutralizing solution, and one testing stone. The platinum testing solutions are potent, effective and will see you through dozens of tests! A must-have tool for jewelry appraisal, jewelry making, precious metal mining, or any other profession that works with platinum. Housed in small, sturdy, shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles, the testing solution bottles are easy to maneuver, giving the tester control over the amount of solution used.

Key Features

  • 3
  • Complete Kit
  • PLATINUM TESTING KIT: Easily test the karat of your gold with ToolTreaux's platinum testing solution kits. Kits include one 0.5oz bottle of testing solution, one 0.5oz bottle of neutralizing solution, and one testing stone
  • PLATINUM TESTING METHOD: Works on any platinum; best used on raw nuggets or grains due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item
  • EASY USE: Simply place a drop of testing solution on your platinum sample deposit and instantly see the results
  • SAFETY FIRT: Included neutralizing solution ensures safe practice and clean up; easily neutralize the harsh chemicals in the testing solution once you are done
  • WARNING: Keep out of reach of children. Exercise extreme caution when opening and using. Proper protective gloves and eyewear are highly recommended. Instruction pamphlet included

Product Specifications

  • Color: Clear

PLATINUM TESTING KIT METHOD: This platinum testing method is best used on raw nuggets or grains, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item. If testing fine jewelry or other finished items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise a finished piece.

INSTRUCTIONS: To test platinum purity, scratch the item onto the test stone leaving a visible deposit. Place a small drop of solution on top of the deposit; if the material on the scratch stone is platinum, the deposit will keep its bright white color for up to a minute. When done, add an equal amount of neutralizing solution to neutralize the platinum solution. Ensure the testing stone has been thoroughly washed and neutralized before performing any more purity tests.

PLEASE NOTE: Testing solutions can be harmful to the skin. Please exercise the utmost caution when opening and using this product and method of testing! Proper protective eye wear and gloves are highly recommended, as the solution can burn unprotected skin. Ensure neutralization of the testing solution after every test by using the neutralizing solution. Read the label on the bottle and follow provided operational instructions.
